channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Loot Goblins Backpacks
item.description: This mod enhances Backpacks size in a reasonable amount to encourage using all types of Backpacks.

item.title: Loot Goblins BIG Chests
item.description: Increases storage container slots by a bit, not double, just a few extra rows.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: ReModel
item.description: Allows running .charsel to only swap the player model without changing class

item.title: Tofu and Soymilk
item.description: Adds soy processing: soymilk and tofu.

item.title: Better Bear Armor
item.description: Repair bear armor with any hide, not just bear pelts — cost scales with size and armor material.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: TassHunting
item.description: Arrows Stick - Blood - Smarter Animal AI - Aiming Tweaks - Health Based Animal Speed

item.title: Honse of Holding
item.description: Unofficial patch for Equus to add front side storage slots like Elks have and lets you add pillions.

item.title: Astria Porta
item.description: Astria Porta brings SG-1's stargates to Vintage Story for you to explore the world

item.title: Fancy Faces
item.description: Adds new faces and the ability to select pieces of each face separately.

item.title: Fanloid Fantweaks
item.description: Misc patches.

item.title: Updated Hieronymus's reptiles collection
item.description: An unofficial update of Hieronymus's various mobs

item.title: Extended Skin Colors
item.description: Adds a hex color scroller to most humanoid races!

item.title: Universal Sticks
item.description: Adds grid recipes to turn firewood into sticks and back

item.title: Equus: Tack and Equipment
item.description: Adds various saddles, bridles, and saddleblankets for Equus and Monoceros

item.title: Advanced Chat
item.description: A fully customizable, movable, resizable chat overlay for Vintage Story. Take control of your chat w

item.title: Zomb's Purposeful Storage Weapon Patches
item.description: Unofficial patches to make several weapon mods work with Purposeful Storage.

item.title: VSDS · Vintage Story Dockerized Server
item.description: Vintage Story Dockerized Server to easily deploy a Vintage Story Server anywhere!

item.title: aldiclasses Dragonia Tweak Server
item.description: aldiclasses Dragonia Tweak Server

item.title: ME's Custom Mod Downloader
item.description: Servers distribute their own custom mods straight to joining clients, consent-gated, hash-verified.

item.title: Equus: Wild Horses 2.0
item.description: Adds tameable wild horses to the game, successor to Equus: Wild Horses

item.title: Dragonia Translations
item.description: Переводы и отредактированные переводы под стиль сервера.

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Poklyk
item.description: Calling progression system where specializations emerge from player actions

item.title: Eternal Seraph Patch
item.description: Патч для серверу Вічний Серафим. Patch for the server Eternal Seraph.

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: xLib Fork
item.description: XLib provides an interface to add skills, abilities and effects to the game.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Eternal Seraph: Backpacks
item.description: Yes. New backpacks again.
